channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [DOLPHMED] Dolphin Medical Services Board Meeting on April 22, 2026
item.description:
Dolphin Medical Services Ltd has announced a Board of Directors meeting scheduled for April 22, 2026. The primary agenda items include the consideration and approval of board meeting intimations. Key discussions will revolve around the appointment of Mr. KOLACHALAMA SAIKUMAR and Smt. SRUJANA SIDDHANI as Independent Directors, and the resignation of Mr. NARENDRA SEENAKARKERA, Mr. VINAY VISHNURAJNAYAK, and Mr. BUDDHA SAGARNANAPANENI as Directors. The meeting will also address the reconstitution of board committees following these changes.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 22, 2026.
  • Consideration of new Independent Director appointments.
  • Review of multiple Director resignations.
  • Reconstitution of board committees planned.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DOLPHIN MEDICAL SERVICES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [TWL] Titagarh Naval Systems Launches 4th Diving Support Craft for Indian Navy
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Titagarh Naval Systems Limited (TNSL), a wholly owned subsidiary of Titagarh Rail Systems Limited, has launched the fourth Diving Support Craft (DSC) A23 (YARD 328) for the Indian Navy. This vessel is part of a series of five DSCs being built under the 'Make in India' initiative. The catamaran-type DSCs are equipped with indigenous systems to support the Indian Navy's Command Clearance Diving Teams for underwater operations. This launch signifies progress in indigenous defence manufacturing and enhances the company's shipbuilding capabilities, supporting the nation's maritime strength and self-reliance. The new Falta facility is being developed to meet future shipbuilding demands.

  • Launched fourth Diving Support Craft (DSC) A23 for Indian Navy.
  • Vessel is part of a series of five under 'Make in India' initiative.
  • DSCs feature advanced indigenous systems for underwater operations.
  • Highlights company's growing shipbuilding capabilities and defence manufacturing focus.
  • Supports Indian Navy's operational preparedness and self-reliance goals.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TITAGARH WAGONS LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [AMAGI] Amagi & Matrox Video Partner for Cloud Broadcast Workflows with ORIGIN
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Amagi Media Labs and Matrox Video have announced a strategic collaboration to integrate Matrox ORIGIN, a software-defined framework, into Amagi's next-generation cloud production architecture. This partnership aims to create highly scalable, flexible, and efficient content production workflows for broadcasters and media companies. The integration will facilitate broadcasters' transition from traditional hardware-based infrastructures to agile, cloud-native environments, enabling real-time resource scaling and infrastructure adaptation. Matrox ORIGIN provides a robust core video pipeline fabric essential for this shift. Both companies share a vision to empower the industry with software-defined architectures, reducing complexity, improving scalability, and unlocking new operational efficiencies for future broadcast infrastructure. This collaboration leverages Matrox Video's expertise in software-defined broadcast technology and Amagi's leading cloud platform to drive innovation in cloud transformation for the media and entertainment sector.

  • Amagi partners with Matrox Video for cloud broadcast workflows.
  • Integration of Matrox ORIGIN enhances Amagi's cloud production architecture.
  • Aims to provide scalable, flexible content production for broadcasters.
  • Facilitates transition to software-defined, cloud-native environments.
  • Strengthens Amagi's technological framework and market position.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Amagi Media Labs Ltd | Category: Partnership

item.title: [AMAGI] Amagi modernizes AccuWeather's broadcasting with cloud platform
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Amagi announced an expanded engagement with AccuWeather, modernizing its broadcast ecosystem. AccuWeather transitioned from traditional infrastructure to Amagi's unified cloud-based system, managing both linear TV and streaming from a single platform. This transformation, anchored at Amagi’s Master Control Room in Princeton, N.J., brings both technology and managed operations under one provider. The move enhances distribution efficiency through an IP-based model, optimizes regionalization, provides real-time agility for live events, and accelerates innovation cycles. This builds on a successful initiative launched in 2021, strengthening Amagi's role in providing cloud-native broadcast solutions and managed services.

  • Amagi expanded its engagement with AccuWeather for broadcast modernization.
  • AccuWeather transitioned to Amagi's unified cloud platform for TV and streaming.
  • The new system offers enhanced distribution efficiency and operational agility.
  • Amagi provides both technology and fully managed operational services.
  • This strengthens Amagi's position in cloud-native broadcast solutions market.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Amagi Media Labs Ltd | Category: Partnership

item.title: [ADVIKLA] MPS Pharmaa (formerly Advik Labs) not a 'Large Corporate' as per SEBI
item.description:
MPS Pharmaa Limited, formerly Advik Laboratories Limited, has confirmed that it does not meet the criteria to be classified as a "Large Corporate" (LC) as of March 31, 2026. This declaration is made in accordance with SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/DDHS/P/CIR/2021/613 dated August 10, 2021, read with SEBI/HO/DDHS/DDHS-RACPOD1/P/CIR/2023/172 dated October 19, 2023, and SEBI/HO/DDHS CIR/P/2018/144 dated November 26, 2018. Consequently, the company is not subject to the specific disclosure and compliance requirements for Large Corporates concerning fund-raising through the issuance of debt securities.

  • Company confirms non-applicability as a 'Large Corporate' (LC).
  • Not subject to SEBI's LC framework for debt securities issuance.
  • Compliance based on SEBI Circulars from 2018, 2021, and 2023.
  • Status confirmed as of March 31, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ADVIK LABORATORIES LTD. | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [UNOMINDA] UNO Minda appoints Vivek Joshi as CEO-LPS Domain
item.description:
🔥 Trending

UNO Minda Ltd. announced the appointment of Mr. Vivek Shripad Joshi as the Chief Executive Officer (CEO) for its LPS Domain, effective April 19, 2026. Mr. Joshi brings over 28 years of experience in global automotive manufacturing, known for delivering sustained profitable growth and large-scale business transformation. His career includes leadership roles at Sundaram Clayton Limited, Ryobi Die Casting (USA), Endurance Technologies, and Jayahind Industries. Initially, Mr. Kundan Kumar Jha, the current CEO-LPS Domain, will continue to front-end business operations for three months to ensure a smooth handover, while Mr. Joshi familiarizes himself with the business. Following this transition period, Mr. Joshi will take over full leadership and accountability for the LPS domain, with Mr. Jha continuing to provide strategic support.

  • UNO Minda appoints Vivek Joshi as CEO-LPS Domain, effective April 19, 2026.
  • Joshi brings over 28 years of experience in global automotive manufacturing.
  • Current CEO, Kundan Jha, will ensure a 3-month smooth transition.
  • Joshi will assume full leadership after the transition period.
  • Jha will continue to contribute in a strategic capacity post-handover.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: UNO Minda Ltd-$ | Category: Management Change

item.title: [BPCAP] B. P. Capital Confirms Non-Applicability of SEBI LC Criteria
item.description:
B. P. Capital Limited has officially confirmed that it does not meet the criteria to be classified as a "Large Corporate (LC)" as of March 31, 2026. This declaration is made in accordance with the framework outlined in SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/DDHS/P/CIR/2021/613 dated August 10, 2021, read with SEBI/HO/DDHS/DDHS-RACPOD1/P/CIR/2023/172 dated October 19, 2023. These circulars pertain to fund raising through debt securities by Large Corporates and their associated disclosure and compliance requirements. The company has requested the stock exchanges to take this information on record.

  • B. P. Capital does not meet SEBI's 'Large Corporate' criteria.
  • This status is confirmed as of March 31, 2026.
  • The confirmation relates to regulations for debt security issuance.
  • It aligns with SEBI Circulars from August 2021 and October 2023.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: B. P. Capital Ltd | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [JRELTD] Eraaya Lifespaces Board approves Q2/H1 FY26 results & appoints CS
item.description:
Eraaya Lifespaces Ltd's Board of Directors, at its meeting on April 18, 2026, approved the unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and half year ended September 30, 2025. These results, reviewed by the Audit Committee, include a Limited Review Report from the Statutory Auditors. Additionally, the Board appointed Ms. Urvashi Upadhyay, currently the Compliance Officer, as the Company Secretary (Key Managerial Personnel) with immediate effect. The filing also noted a restatement of the unaudited standalone financial results for the quarter ended June 30, 2025, due to new information regarding the transfer of shares of Ebix International Holding Limited.

  • Board approved Q2 and H1 FY26 unaudited financial results.
  • Ms. Urvashi Upadhyay appointed as Company Secretary (KMP).
  • Q1 FY26 standalone financial results were restated.
  • Statutory Auditors provided Limited Review Report for results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Justride Enterprises Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [JRELTD] Eraaya Lifespaces Board approves Q2/H1 FY26 results; appoints CS
item.description:
Eraaya Lifespaces Ltd's Board of Directors met on April 18, 2026, and approved the unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and half year ended September 30, 2025. The results were reviewed by the Audit Committee and accompanied by a Limited Review Report from the Statutory Auditors. Additionally, the Board approved the appointment of Ms. Urvashi Upadhyay, currently the Compliance Officer, as the Company Secretary (Key Managerial Personnel) with immediate effect, following the recommendation of the Nomination and Remuneration Committee. The filing also noted a restatement of Q1 FY26 standalone financial results due to a subsidiary share transfer.

  • Board approved unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results for Q2 and H1 FY26.
  • Ms. Urvashi Upadhyay appointed as Company Secretary (KMP) with immediate effect.
  • Statutory Auditors issued a Limited Review Report on the financial results.
  • Unaudited standalone financial results for Q1 FY26 were restated.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Justride Enterprises Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [ADANIENT] Adani Airport City incorporates 3 new real estate subsidiaries
item.description:
Adani Airport City Limited, a step-down wholly owned subsidiary of Adani Enterprises Ltd, has incorporated three new wholly owned subsidiaries: Adani Navi Mumbai Airport City Limited (ANMACL), Adani Guwahati Airport City Limited (AGACL), and Adani Ahmedabad Airport City Limited (AAACL). These entities were incorporated on April 6, 2026, in India, each with a paid-up share capital of ₹10,00,000. The new subsidiaries will primarily engage in real estate activities, including development with own or leased property, construction, and operating hotels with integrated facilities. This strategic move aims to expand Adani's footprint in the real estate and hospitality sectors linked to airport infrastructure.

  • Adani Airport City Ltd, a step-down subsidiary, incorporated three new wholly-owned subsidiaries.
  • New entities are Adani Navi Mumbai, Guwahati, and Ahmedabad Airport City Limited.
  • They will focus on real estate activities, construction, and hospitality.
  • Each subsidiary has a paid-up capital of ₹10,00,000.
  • This expands Adani's presence in airport-related real estate development.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ADANI ENTERPRISES LTD. | Category: Subsidiary
